reasons: live server started without mutation-oriented flags
all four readonly GET endpoints were reachable and returned valid JSON
/api/actions behaved as metadata-only surface and did not leak adapter command ids or launch client path

controlled live failure on accounts refresh did not fall back to fixture truth and did not show false healthy state

treat /api/actions as metadata, not runtime truth
keep fixture and live truth strictly separated
